title: Privacy Policy

content:
At Techlekh, we take your privacy seriously and are committed to protecting your personal information. Our Privacy Policy outlines the types of information we collect, how we use it, and your options regarding your personal information.

We may collect personal information from you when you visit our website or use our services, such as your name, email address, mailing address, phone number, or other information you provide to us. We may also collect information about your use of our website or services, such as the pages you visit or the actions you take.

When you access our website, you are deemed to have agreed to all the provisions of this privacy policy. Your consent is given freely and with the intention of creating legal effect, rather than being a default act. By freely consenting, you agree that your use of the services is subject to this privacy policy and other terms published on this website.

Please note that this privacy policy may be modified at any time and from time to time, with the date of the most recent revision appearing on this page. Please review this page periodically, and continued access to the services following modification of this privacy policy will constitute your acceptance of the modified policy.

Please read this privacy policy carefully, and review our terms of service that govern your use of the services. If you do not agree to be bound by all of the terms set forth below, do not use any services.

By using this website or the services described in this policy, you consent to the data collection, use, disclosure, and storage practices described in this privacy policy.

We use your personal information to provide our services to you, to communicate with you about our services, and to improve our services. We may also use your personal information for other purposes, such as to conduct research, stastical analysis, administrative purposes or to send you promotional materials that we believe will be of interest to you.

As part of providing our services to you, we may share your personal information with third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website and features. Additionally, we may share your information with third parties who may send you promotional materials or special offers, unless you choose to opt-out by clicking on the “unsubscribe” link in such emails. We may also share your personal information with third parties for the specific purposes for which it was collected.

We may participate in affiliate marketing programs, which means we may earn commissions on products or services we promote through our website. We only promote products or services that we believe will be of interest to our readers, and we will always disclose if we earn a commission for any products or services promoted on our website.

We may use Google Ads and Local Ads network to display ads on our website. Please note that third-party advertisers, including Google, may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect information about your online activities over time and across different websites.

We use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect information about your use of our website and services, such as your IP address, browser type, device type, and other information. We use this information to improve our services and to provide you with a better user experience.

When using our Services, you may come across content or websites that are created, owned, operated, or hosted by third parties, which may be displayed as part of a frame that includes our content. You may also see links to other websites on our Services.

Please note that we are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these third-party websites or content. You should review their privacy policies before providing any personally identifiable information.

The collected information may be disclosed in good faith, either when required by law or when reasonably necessary.

We may also share or disclose your information to affiliates or partners that perform business-related functions on our behalf, such as conducting research and analytics, creating content, providing customer or technical support, conducting or supporting marketing, fulfilling orders and user requests, sending or supporting online or mobile advertising, and otherwise supporting our Services.

You may choose not to provide us with certain personal information, but this may limit your ability to use our services. You may also opt-out of receiving promotional materials from us by contacting us directly.

We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse. However, no security measure is perfect, and we cannot guarantee the security of your personal information.

Last Updated April 12, 2023

meta.og:title: Privacy Policy
meta.og:description: Discover how TechLekh.com collects, uses, and protects your data in accordance with our privacy policy.
